articles.title: Kim Se-ui arrested over AI voice clone in Kim Soo-hyun case
articles.description: South Korean YouTuber Kim Se-ui of Hover Lab has been arrested for allegedly using AI to defame actor Kim Soo-hyun. Authorities claim Kim Se-ui falsely alleged Kim Soo-hyun dated the late Kim Sae-ron when she was a minor, using manipulated voice recordings and text messages. Kim Soo-hyun denies the claims, stating they dated only when she was an adult.

articles.title: 5 places on Earth where you can experience all four seasons in one road trip
articles.description: There are road trips, and then there are journeys which turn into lifetime experiences. Now these road trips are such where the weather becomes part of the adventure. Imagine beginning your drive amid a hot summer day, running into snow-capped mountain views by noon, crossing golden autumn forests in the next few hours and landing into spring blossoms the next day!

Suresh revealed the suspension after a public spat with a YouTube reviewer regarding negative film criticism. He also spoke out against online hate campaigns targeting filmmakers and his family, citing personal insults and a political connection.

articles.title: Quote of the Day by Michael Jackson: 'My attitude is if fashion says it's forbidden, I'm going to...' - How the 'King of Pop' turned defiance into a fashion legacy
articles.description: Quote of the Day by Michael Jackson: Michael Jackson, the 'King of Pop', revolutionized music with his groundbreaking albums like 'Thriller' and iconic dance moves. His fearless approach to fashion, as seen in his quote, allowed him to challenge norms and become a global style icon. Jackson's enduring legacy continues to inspire artists and captivate audiences worldwide.

articles.title: First Look Out: Saiyami Kher to Play a Photographer in Vikram Phadnis’ Human-Emotion-Driven Drama
articles.description: Actor Saiyami Kher has unveiled her striking first look from filmmaker Vikram Phadnis’ upcoming untitled romantic drama, offering audiences a glimpse into a deeply emotional and layered world rooted in human relationships and emotions. In the newly released first look, Saiyami unveils the first look as she is set to essay a fashion photographer in the film. In the first look, she’s holding a professional camera amidst a natural outdoor backdrop, her understated look reflects the grounded and realistic tone of the film, which revolves around love, emotions, and the complexities of human connection. For the role, Saiyami took inspiration from her real life friend, India’s celebrated fashion photographer, Taras Taraporvala. The film also stars Tahir Raj Bhasin, Vineet Kumar in pivotal roles. Marking an important milestone for Vikram Phadnis, the project will be his first Hindi directorial film to release, making it a particularly special venture for the filmmaker known for his keen understanding of aesthetics, emotions, and storytelling. Speaking about the project and collaborating with Vikram Phadnis, Saiyami Kher shared , “Vikram narrated the film and it was a yes right away for me. Again I’m very grateful that I have got such an author backed role. Actors like myself are dying to get such meaty parts.so everytime I get an opportunity like this I consider my self very very blessed. This film is deeply personal to vikram and it adds even more responsibility on me to live upto his expectations. I sure hope I have. Vikram is a really really wonderful soul. His earnestness and hardwork and his conviction are the reasons this film has been made possible. He was very very sure about exactly what he wants. I also feel with so many years in the industry as one of the biggest names in the fashion industry and the access he has he could have gotten anyone he wanted for this part but he stuck to being honest to the role and followed his conviction with his choices. I play a photographer in the film And it’s always wonderful to pick up s new skill with every film. As you can see vikram has given me a completely different look in the film. I am delighted I have gotten to work with Vineet and Tahir. They are both fantastic actors. Very secure and very giving which makes life so much simipler. I am very fortunate that I have a film like Haiwaan and then this film just to contrasting parts and films. All I can hope for is getting to live many many more new lives in front of camera .” With its emotionally driven narrative and compelling cast, the film is already generating curiosity among audiences eager to see Saiyami Kher in yet another nuanced and performance-oriented role.
articles.source: Latest Movie Updates, Film News, Movie Reviews,pre

articles.description: TIFF 2026: Acclaimed filmmaker Christopher Nolan will be celebrated with a comprehensive retrospective at the Toronto International Film Festival’s summer marquee series. The special programme arrives just days before the North American theatrical release of his highly anticipated film The Odyssey.

articles.title: Meghan Markle faces backlash over Princess Lilibet post
articles.description: Meghan Markle faced criticism for a social media post featuring her daughter just before a speech on online harms to children. Commentators deemed the move hypocritical, especially as she addressed cyberbullying's impact. The Duchess later spoke in Switzerland about the dangers of social media products for young people, highlighting the need for better safeguards.

articles.title: Lil Wayne secretly engaged to woman in 20s after ending on-and-off relationship with Denise Bidot
articles.description: Rapper Lil Wayne is reportedly engaged again to a woman in her twenties from Indiana, according to TMZ. This news follows a tumultuous period for the artist, including recent public statements about feeling overlooked in the music industry and a public breakup with ex-girlfriend Denise Bidot, who made accusations of emotional and physical abuse.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Khaled Hosseini: ‘Children aren't coloring books. You don't get to...’ – ‘The Kite Runner’ author shares a lesson on identity and parenting
articles.description: Khaled Hosseini, author of 'The Kite Runner', cautions against imposing parental dreams on children, likening them to unique individuals, not coloring books. His quote emphasizes autonomy and the dangers of love demanding replication over understanding. Hosseini's works often explore how external expectations, from family to society, shape characters' identities and struggles.

articles.title: Knox rocks Angelina's 90s look amid comparisons to Brad
articles.description: Knox Jolie-Pitt has turned heads with a vibrant orange hair transformation, reminiscent of his mother Angelina Jolie's iconic 1999 look. This bold change follows recent buzz about his striking resemblance to father Brad Pitt at his sister Zahara's graduation. Knox, the youngest of the Jolie-Pitt children, continues to explore his style, drawing comparisons to his famous parents.

articles.title: “He hates the limitations": Travis Kelce reportedly finding life with Taylor Swift harder in one unexpected way
articles.description: With Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's wedding reportedly just weeks away, new reports claim the Chiefs star is still adjusting to the intense security measures that come with dating one of the world's biggest celebrities. Sources say Kelce misses the freedom of spontaneous outings and last-minute plans but understands why the precautions are necessary. Despite finding the restrictions challenging, insiders insist he remains deeply committed to Swift and their future together.

articles.title: Quote of the day by Mae West: 'Getting married is like trading the adoration of many for the sarcasm of one...' - A witty observation about the shift from romance to reality in married life, by one of America's boldest stars
articles.description: Mae West’s famous quote about marriage reflects her trademark mix of humour and sharp social observation that made her one of old Hollywood’s most recognisable personalities. Known for her bold dialogue, witty one-liners and fearless approach to discussing love and relationships, West built a career challenging conservative attitudes through comedy. From her early days in vaudeville and controversial Broadway plays to becoming a major Hollywood star in the 1930s, she remained influential for her independent image, clever writing style and lasting impact on entertainment and popular culture.

articles.title: "That boy was crying": Cardi B and Stefon Diggs face viral paternity rumor after explosive Offset claim
articles.description: A viral social media post has sparked intense speculation involving Cardi B, Stefon Diggs, and Offset after claiming a DNA test allegedly revealed unexpected paternity results. The post quickly gained traction online and fueled widespread debate among fans. However, no verified evidence has been presented to support the allegations, and none of the parties involved have publicly confirmed the claims. For now, the story remains an unverified rumor driven largely by social media discussion.

articles.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce reportedly ‘relieved’ by Blake Lively setback as wedding guest list finally reveals if she’ll attend the big day
articles.description: Taylor Swift is reportedly focused on her upcoming wedding to Travis Kelce while keeping an eye on Blake Lively’s ongoing legal battle with Justin Baldoni. Reports claim Swift feels relieved by recent developments and wants the controversy resolved before her wedding. Meanwhile, speculation continues over Lively’s place in Swift’s inner circle after her name was reportedly absent from pre-wedding celebration plans, fueling questions about whether she will attend the wedding.

articles.description: The Delhi High Court on Tuesday issued a formal notice on an application filed by Priya Kapur, who has sought permission to access late businessman Sunjay Kapur’s Employees’ Provident Fund (EPF) accounts to pay the school fees and educational expenses of his children, Samaira and Kiaan, with former wife Karisma Kapoor.

The actress also admitted that she no longer believes in the idea of having one “primary” partner.

articles.title: Kehlani announces 33-date North American “World Tour” for 2026: Full schedule and ticket details
articles.description: Kehlani has announced the North American leg of her “Kehlani World Tour,” a 33-date run supporting her self-titled album. The tour begins August 6 in Minneapolis and ends October 3 in San Francisco, covering major cities across the U.S. and Canada. Her album debuted at No. 4 on the Billboard 200 and produced the hit “Folded,” which became a record-breaking R&B airplay leader and earned two Grammy Awards.
